questionHtml: State one factor that increases the rate at which saturated lipids become rancid.
markschemeHtml:
«presence of» moisture/water

OR

«increase in» temperature

OR

«presence of» enzymes/bacteria/fungi/mould

OR

low pH/«presence of» acid

 

Accept “heat”.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one factor that increases the rate at which saturated lipids become rancid.
